repoContext.publicRepoNotice: Treat every committed file as public, including `.factory/**`, `.github/**`, prompts, and docs content.
repoContext.previewPolicy: Do not run `mintlify dev`, `npm run dev`, or preview commands autonomously; previews are human-only.
repoContext.statusPolicy: `mintlify status` depends on local authentication, so avoid it in unattended flows unless the user asked.

rules.reason: Mintlify previews are human-only in this repo. Use Mintlify validation or PR previews instead.
Mintlify login changes local auth state. Only run it when the user explicitly asked for authentication work.
Mintlify status depends on local authentication. Only run it when the user explicitly asked for status or authentication checks.
